name: Fun in a Hotel Room
description:
So I made a very avoidable NTR situation. You should thank me by giving me likes, I am so Kind.

Seriously, very avoidable if you're an asshole to your girlfriend. And the Chad is even a nice guy. I do this for all the cuck fans who roleplay as haters.

Enjoy!

Also OOC is locked because I like reading hate messages. They show me who are my secret fans 💕
creator: Hard_Fluff_Master
